meta.siteDescription: MyClup helps gyms manage memberships, classes, and bookings. Discover gyms near you and book classes online.

shell.subtitle: One shell for access, conversations, and member actions.

adminShell.title: Operations workspace
adminShell.subtitle: Coordinate schedules, attendance, and member follow-up from one consistent control room.
adminShell.chatSubtitle: Handle active member conversations without leaving the admin shell.

staffAuth.title: Sign in to staff tools
staffAuth.subtitle: Use your gym credentials. Session is required for schedule, members, and chat.
staffAuth.supabaseMissing: Auth is not configured in this build.

staffHome.title: Today’s operations
staffHome.subtitle: Switch tabs for members, schedule, chat, workouts, or sales. Tabs match your role.
staffHome.whoamiWarning: Could not load your role assignments. Some tabs stay hidden until the account API responds.
staffHome.quickSectionSubtitle: Navigation is in the tab bar.
staffHome.tabHint: Member search uses the shared BFF when directory APIs land; attendance can validate a membership instance today.

staffMembers.title: Member operations
staffMembers.subtitle: Search and open member profiles within your tenant. Server-side search ships with the member directory API.
staffMembers.searchNote: Results appear when the directory endpoint is wired. Until then, use attendance check-in with a membership instance id.
staffMembers.emptySearch: No matches yet — try a different query once search is enabled.
staffMembers.statusUnknown: Tenant scope will show after profile loads.
staffMembers.attendanceSubtitle: Validate membership at the door using a membership instance id.

staffAttendance.title: Check-in
staffAttendance.subtitle: Validates access against the current branch from your session.
staffAttendance.instancePlaceholder: UUID from membership card or roster
staffAttendance.noBranch: Your account has no active branch in session. Open the web admin or switch branch, then retry.
staffAttendance.invalidInstanceId: Enter a valid membership instance UUID.

staffWorkouts.title: Workouts
staffWorkouts.subtitle: Programming and templates for instructors.
staffWorkouts.placeholder: Workout builder and AI cleanup will connect to the shared AI service boundary. Use the web admin for full editing until mobile flows ship.

staffSales.title: Leads
staffSales.subtitle: Capture prospects on the floor; sync to CRM when Epic #35 marketplace hooks land.
staffSales.pipelineSubtitle: Stored on device for this session only.

scheduleWorkspace.heroSubtitle: Track the next sessions, keep participant rosters current, and update attendance without leaving the shared booking flow.
scheduleWorkspace.sessionsSubtitle: Browse branch and instructor activity from the shared scheduling API.
scheduleWorkspace.participantsSubtitle: Keep booking states and attendance updates aligned with the backend source of truth.
scheduleWorkspace.availabilitySubtitle: Review upcoming availability blocks beside the operational roster.
scheduleWorkspace.loadingBody: Loading calendar, capacity, and attendance data...
scheduleWorkspace.emptyBody: The calendar workspace will populate as soon as the first class or appointment is created.
scheduleWorkspace.errorBody: Try again to refresh the scheduling workspace.
scheduleWorkspace.noParticipants: No participants in this session yet.

dashboard.heroSubtitle: Check your membership, open the latest conversation, or jump into the next member action.
dashboard.membershipSubtitle: See the current plan and the next action point.
dashboard.quickActionsSubtitle: Keep the most common member tasks within reach.
dashboard.paymentsSubtitle: Placeholder for billing nudges and renewal reminders.
dashboard.notificationsSubtitle: Ready for alerts, reminders, and status updates.

membershipDashboard.errorBody: Try again to refresh the membership summary.

messagesDashboard.emptyBody: Your chat inbox will appear here once a conversation starts.
messagesDashboard.errorBody: Try again to refresh the latest conversations.

quickActions.bookClassHint: See upcoming classes from your gym schedule.
quickActions.showQrHint: Open the member pass in membership.
quickActions.discoverGymsHint: Browse nearby gyms and trial-ready listings.
quickActions.trackProgressHint: Workouts and measurements will sync here.

memberBooking.title: Classes & schedule
memberBooking.subtitle: Upcoming sessions you can book or join from your gym.
memberBooking.loadingBody: Fetching the latest class sessions from your gym.
memberBooking.errorBody: Pull to refresh or try again when you are back online.
memberBooking.emptyBody: When your gym publishes classes, they will appear here for booking.

memberDiscovery.title: Discover gyms
memberDiscovery.subtitle: Search and compare gyms that match your goals.
memberDiscovery.body: Map-based discovery and trial booking will connect to the marketplace APIs as Epic #35 lands.

memberProgress.title: Your progress
memberProgress.subtitle: Workouts, check-ins, and measurements in one timeline.
memberProgress.body: Progress sync and charts will appear after workout logging APIs are wired (Epic #30).

paymentsDashboard.body: When payment or renewal reminders are ready, they will surface here.

notificationsDashboard.body: This slot is reserved for push and in-app notifications.

notifications.heroSubtitle: See what needs your attention now, and what will land here once delivery channels go live.
notifications.centerSubtitle: Current reminders come from existing membership and chat data. Future transport-backed alerts stay explicit placeholders.
notifications.loadingBody: Checking membership urgency and unread conversations.
notifications.errorBody: Try again to refresh the latest member signals.
notifications.membershipExpiredBody: Renew now to restore access and keep the member surface current.
notifications.membershipExpiringBody: Renew before the access window closes to avoid interruption.
notifications.chatUnreadBodySingle: You have {{count}} unread message waiting in the latest conversation.
notifications.chatUnreadBodyMany: You have {{count}} unread messages across active conversations.
notifications.caughtUpBody: There are no urgent member reminders right now. This center will keep future alerts in one place.
notifications.bookingPlaceholderBody: Class reminders and waitlist nudges will appear here after the booking surface is wired.
notifications.updatesPlaceholderBody: Push, campaign, and app update alerts remain placeholders until delivery transport is enabled.
notifications.quickLinksSubtitle: Jump directly into the member surfaces connected to these reminders.

notificationsCenter.loadingBody: Gathering the latest membership and chat signals.
notificationsCenter.errorBody: Try again to reload the latest member reminders.
notificationsCenter.title: Notifications and reminders
notificationsCenter.subtitle: Track live member signals in one place while future delivery channels stay clearly marked as placeholders.
notificationsCenter.liveSubtitle: These cards are powered by membership and chat data already available in the app.
notificationsCenter.plannedSubtitle: These slots stay visible so booking and app-level reminders never appear as silent gaps.

body.expired: Your membership has expired. Renew now to restore access.
body.expiringSoon: Your renewal window is open. Renew before access is interrupted.
body.stable: Your current membership is active and available in the membership hub.
body.placeholder: A membership reminder card will appear here once a plan is assigned.

meta.expired: Expired memberships stay actionable until renewal is submitted.
meta.expiring_soon: Renew before the next expiry checkpoint to avoid interruptions.

body.unread: You have {{count}} unread messages waiting for follow-up.
body.stable: Your latest conversation is synced and available in chat.
body.placeholder: A chat reminder card will appear here once a conversation starts.
Class reminders and waitlist nudges will land here when booking delivery is ready.
Push alerts, campaigns, and release notes will appear here once delivery channels are enabled.

profile.title: Profile and settings
profile.subtitle: Manage the member details supported today and track which settings arrive next.
profile.loadingBody: Fetching your member identity and settings surface.
profile.errorBody: Try again to refresh your profile and settings data.

supported.title: Editable basics
supported.subtitle: These fields are backed by the current auth profile API.

linkedGym.title: Linked gym context
linkedGym.subtitle: Resolved from the authenticated tenant scope.

placeholders.title: Next settings domains
placeholders.subtitle: These profile/settings areas stay visible even before persistence lands.
placeholders.emergencyBody: Emergency contact editing will land once member profile persistence expands beyond auth fields.
placeholders.healthBody: Health notes and waiver-aware profile notes are reserved for a future backed slice.
placeholders.notificationsBody: Push, booking, and payment notification preferences will be wired when transport support is active.
placeholders.privacyBody: Privacy and consent controls will surface here when policy and consent persistence is ready.
placeholders.agreementsBody: Signed forms, waivers, and member agreements will appear here in a later document slice.
placeholders.helpBody: Contextual help and support shortcuts will expand here without changing the shell layout.

profile.heroSubtitle: Update the fields the member app supports and review the rest of the account surface.

form.title: Profile details
form.subtitle: Only supported fields can be edited here.

linkedGym.title: Linked gym context
linkedGym.subtitle: Current tenant scope and role assignments.

sections.title: Support and settings placeholders
sections.subtitle: These sections are reserved for the next profile iterations.

emergencyContact.title: Emergency contact
emergencyContact.subtitle: Placeholder for emergency contact details.
emergencyContact.body: Emergency contact management is not connected yet.

healthNotes.title: Health notes
healthNotes.subtitle: Placeholder for health and accessibility notes.
healthNotes.body: Health note storage is not available yet.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Placeholder for privacy controls and sharing settings.
privacy.body: Privacy controls will be added in a later surface.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Placeholder for notification preferences.
notifications.body: Notification preferences are not configurable yet.

agreements.title: Agreements
agreements.subtitle: Placeholder for consent and policy acknowledgements.
agreements.body: Agreement management is planned for a later release.

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Placeholder for support links and guidance.
help.body: Help actions will connect to support resources later.
